description: DrSam authenticated user SPA. Extend the existing React + Vite prototype in frontend/ — do not recreate from scratch or introduce a parallel Vue app.

adapter_when: Server secret required (service role, third-party API key) — not user JWT passthrough
Inbound webhook or server-triggered side effect during Bubble migration
Multi-step orchestration intentionally kept off the client
adapter_forbidden_when: Single edge function proxy with user JWT (use frontend fetch to functions/v1)
Single Supabase RPC proxy (use supabase.rpc from frontend)
Single RLS-backed REST read/write (use supabase.from from frontend)
forbidden: Duplicate or fork Supabase schema in client code
Reimplement business rules that already exist in Supabase edge functions unless explicitly required by AC
Create a parallel Vue SPA or provider-app/ tree
